content: We can frame LLM self-reflection mechanisms after the linguistic double meaning of "reflexion" to design a graded reflection framework that incorporates both the AI’s internal self-correction (the computational Reflexion agent framework) and the human second-language lexical acquisition reflection practice from high school English curricula. This framework uses incremental lexical reflection exercises can improve LLMs to refine their outputs for both domain-specific writing tasks like academic English writing.
